options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage

options.name: -allow_model_with_io
options.description: Supports model with I/Os.

options.name: -allow_powerdomain_in_flexmodel
options.description: Allow powerdomain in flexmodel

options.name: -create_dir
options.description: Specifies the directory to save created models.

options.name: -create_high_fanout_psPM
options.description: Create high fanout psPM models.

options.name: -create_lib
options.description: Specifies the OA library to save created models.

options.name: -create_metal_fill_NDR
options.description: Will be used by create_ps_per_micron_model for creating psPM model for nets with non default rules.

options.name: -create_metal_fill_nominal
options.description: Will be used by create_ps_per_micron_model for creating psPM model for normal nets.

options.name: -create_multi_corner_psPM
options.description: Create multi corner psPM models.

options.name: -create_NDR_psPM_model
options.description: Control whether create_ps_per_micron_model should generate psPM model for non default rule or not

options.name: -create_no_flex_filler
options.description: Create proto model without adding flex filler.

options.name: -create_partition_as_flexmodel
options.description: Create partition specified as flexmodel automatically.

options.name: -create_pipeline_flop
options.description: Specifies a list of pipeline flop instance patterns that are used in the design.

options.name: -create_powerdomain_psPM
options.description: Create power domain psPM models.

options.name: -create_timing_budget
options.description: Keep consistent setting of deriveTimingBudget

options.name: -identify_algorithm
options.description: identify_proto algorithm <default=auto>

options.name: -identify_estimated_flexmodel_number
options.description: Specified the estimated flexModel number to identify for the design when using instance group based identify_proto_model.

options.name: -identify_exclude_module
options.description: Excludes specified module(s) but not its sub-modules for being marked as models.

options.name: -identify_exclude_module_and_parent
options.description: Excludes specified module(s) and their parents for being marked as models.

options.name: -identify_exclude_module_tree
options.description: Excludes specified module(s) and its sub-modules for being marked as models.

options.name: -identify_honor_objects_hierarchy
options.description: Specified the list of objects which instance group based identify_proto_model will honor its hierarchy.

options.name: -identify_max_inst
options.description: Specifies the maximum instance count threshold of a module to be marked as model.(default=8% of total instance count and no lower than 300K instances)

options.name: -identify_min_inst
options.description: Specifies the minimum instance count threshold of a module to be marked as model.

options.name: -keep_inst_file_only
options.description: FlexModel only contains inst in keep_inst_file.

options.name: -keep_instance_defined_in_sdc
options.description: FlexModel will keep inst defined in sdc file

options.name: -keep_slack_improve_NDR
options.description: Will be used by report_NDR_WNS_gain to keep top critical nets as non default rule nets .

options.name: -max_report_NDR_net
options.description: Will be used by create_ps_per_micron_model for creating psPM model for nets with non default rules.

options.name: -route_net_NDR
options.description: Will be used by create_ps_per_micron_model for creating psPM model for nets with non default rules.

options.name: -timing_net_delay_model
options.description: set mode of calculating wire delay

options.name: -timing_ps_per_micron
options.description: Specifies the estimated delay per micron for each routing layer. Layer range is from 1 to maximum routing layers.

options.name: -verbose
options.description: Output detailed information into .log file.

options.name: -quiet
options.description: Displays the current settings in Tcl list format only

options.name: -nonDefault
options.description: Displays the current settings which are not default settings
